theScene: As is customary at the Goddess' Embrace, the inn gets increasingly busy and animated as the hours of the night stretch on, and before you know it, you've got your hands full serving drinks, chatting with customers, and handling all your other assorted duties as temp assistant bartender, while around you, the common room's chatter has grown into a continuous roaring din, indicative of a particularly successful evening.

You're in the middle of listening to a broke, persistent, and passably drunk minotaur trying to coax you into having some fun with her 'on the house', when Belle's looming figure suddenly appears next to you, the bartender sporting a fuming grimace that sends the deadbeat cow woman scurrying off with impressive speed after a mumbled excuse, leaving you alone to face her angry brethren.

Realizing the kind of fearsome expression she's wearing when you worriedly look up at her, the musclebound monster girl stops, closes her eyes, clenches her fists, and takes a deep breath, then opens her eyes again to look at you in a way that still plainly speaks of annoyance, but at least doesn't make her look like she's about to throw someone.
Hrm... Hey, [ThePlayerName], sorry to put this on you, but I'll need you to take over on {i}that{/i} one. I'm at my fucking limit with this woman... Whereas you get along well with her, right?
She glares off to the side, prompting you to follow her gaze to the other end of the bar...

... where you find a sloshed-looking Elena next to a Blue Slime, the two of them in the middle of what looks like a drinking contest judging by the number of empty glasses before them... as well as by the guildswoman angrily slamming her palm on the counter and clamoring for more.

... where you find a sloshed-looking Elena next to a familiar Blue Slime, the two of them up to their usual drunken shenanigans judging by the number of empty glasses before them... as well as by the guildswoman angrily slamming her palm on the counter and clamoring for more.
... Don't worry, it's nothing too bad... Or out of the ordinary, sad to say. It's just that she...
I know I'm making you do the dirty work {i}again{/i}, but you handled it well last time... And while I know {i}I{/i} could do it, that woman...
{b}Heeeeey!{/b} How long's a girl gotta wait to get some service here!? Y'can't cut me off, that's, like, illegal and stuff!
But you just need to serve her drinks and see to it that she doesn't break anything. She'll run out of steam... eventually.
And I'll add a bonus to your pay for the trouble, okay? Atta boy.
And just like last time, I'll add a bonus to your pay for the trouble, okay? Atta boy.

And so with an encouraging pat on the shoulder, Belle runs off to put out other metaphorical fires, leaving you to deal with Elena... as well as the slime girl who, you notice, has cheerfully joined the human woman in banging on the counter, making a racket that mercifully stops when you approach, the guild lady welcoming your arrival with drunken forwardness.
Go see Elena at the Guild counter.

|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|1|/|Excited|n|[ThePlayerName]!! The cutesht adventurer this side of Lucidia! Sho good to see you! You're here to take care of me, right!? My good friend and I're havin' shome friendly competishun and we need your besht stuff to see us through the night!

|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|1|/|Base|n|Aaah, finally... Hm? Oh, it'sh you, [ThePlayerName]? Here t'get your perv on, I bet... But it'sh no matter... My good friend and I're havin' shome friendly competishun and we need your besht stuff to see us through the night!

Gaaah! It'sh about time! I thought y'were going to make me wait until I died of thirst or shomething! My good friend and I're havin' shome friendly competishun and we need your besht stuff to see us through the night!

With mounting dread and a growing understanding of Belle's feelings, you look around and realize that Elena's impromptu show seems to have attracted quite the attention, a crowd of a dozen patrons (and counting) watching the duo, humans and monster girls excitedly exchanging comments, bets, and laughs, plainly looking forward to the contest's development.

You can't help but feel a sigh rise up your chest, as well as a sinking sympathy for Belle, when you see that once more, the human-monster duo has already begun to attract a crowd, amused comments and bets readily flowing behind the two obliviously smiling drinkers, pointing to the all-too-familiar scene unfolding exactly like the previous time...

Meanwhile, the buzzed guildswoman joyfully slaps the innocent-looking Blue Slime on the back with probably enough force to dislodge a bone, her unrestrained demonstration of companionship fortunately only making the jelly girl wobble unconcernedly atop her stool owing to her slimy nature, and getting a happy giggle out of her.
He he, we hit it off and now we're friends.♪
I thought I'd come by again, and I slombled into Elena again, who invited me again, since we're good friends and all.♪
That'sh right! Th'besht of friends! ... And all that waiting and calling and not-drinking's made us both thirsty! So get us another Alraune Mead, will ya?

In for an inch, in for a mile, you dutifully fill two clean mugs with the golden, syrupy, foamy liquid while the assembled rubberneckers cheer behind you. Even just smelling the sweet scent wafting up the brew is enough to bring a slight blush to your cheeks, making you feel all the more incredulous when you walk back to the duo and take in the half-dozen empty tankards and glasses in front of them, the human culprit whooping at your return.
With practiced smoothness, the two of them grab their order, turn to each other, and toast.

Feeling like you're staring at a caravan crash, you watch along with the patrons as the two bring their drinks to their lips and chug, more and more of the recipients' hefty capacity disappearing down their throats, second after second in dramatic near-silence, until Elena brings down her empty mug on the wooden counter with a loud thud and an elated sigh, followed soon after by the slime who keeps her own glass in her hands.
Mmmh, yeah, it's good. It's all sweet and tingly.♪

Somehow, while the human woman needs a moment to recuperate from the prodigious intake, her monstrous competitor seems none the worse for wear, fondly cradling the tankard for a bit longer with a giddy hum while mutters of disbelief echo among the growing crowd surrounding them.
Isn't that their third mug? ...Not to mention the other stuff? I'm a guy who can hold his drink, and I'd already be down for the count...

Meanwhile, the guildswoman recovers from her buzz, shaking off her dazed expression and trading it for a knowing smile, though the now very red flush all over her face nonetheless attests to her increased state of inebriation.
Oh ho, shtill holdin' up, uh? Looksh like we're gunna have t'pick up th'pace...

Wondering if you should stop things there, but remembering Belle's instructions and figuring that trying to reason with a drunk Elena would be an exercise in futility, you stoically await her next order as she turns to you, eyes aglow with boozy cheer.
Bartender! Oni shake... I mean sake!

While the incredulous chatter and the number of onlookers keep growing, you remember the directions you were given before starting your shift and deftly open one of the cupboards beneath the counter, taking out an earthenware bottle depicting a flexing horned woman along with two cups, which you set down on the bar and fill, feeling a whiff of alcohol shoot straight up your nostril while the Blue Slime watches and ooohs curiously.

It'sh shuper shtrong liquor made from rice by onis. It'sh fermented for a veeeery long time using shecret techniques, which givesh it a shuper high alcohol content... It'sh not for lightweights, he he...

Having clearly intended for her speech to make a bigger impression on the little monster girl, Elena is visibly miffed at the nonchalant reception, but nevertheless staunchly picks up her glass and raises it while bets and comments redouble all around, the slime girl imitating her enthusiastically.

Again, more liquor is poured down the two boozehounds' throats, each swallowing her full cup in one gulp before their audience's mesmerized eyes, the guildswoman once more needing a moment to recover from the sake's potent kick while her opponent just giggles joyously, eliciting bewildered whispers and gasps of wonder from the gobsmacked spectators.

Obviously ticked off by the goo girl's lack of reaction, Elena throws caution to the wind and grabs the bottle to refill her and her competitor's glasses with a vengeance... Then they both drain their cups again... and again, to the assembled customers' mounting awe, the inn's atmosphere growing increasingly electric as the two drinkers' intake reaches properly inhuman proportions.
No way, I want to see where this is going!

Eventually, the last remaining drops of the bottle are poured and imbibed, prompting more dumbfounded muttering, head-shaking, and passing of Eros. Despite having drunk enough of the extraordinary sake to knock out a hellhound, Elena somehow manages to stay upright, though she sways dangerously, looking like her head must be surrounded by little dancing onis. As for the Blue Slime...
Mmmh, it's not bad! The taste is very... ricey?
I liked the Alraune Nectar better, though...

Her innocent feedback causes a mixed wave of roaring laughter, silent staring, and unbelieving fascination, the resulting din shaking the hammered woman out of her boozy stupor and making her react by bringing down her fist upon the counter with a loud bang that instantly brings back silence, the punch almost splintering the bar's wood. Snorting like a minotaur, she remains mostly still for a few moments, then shouts.

The whole audience erupts in a chaos of renewed bets and incredulous cries, pretty much the entirety of the Goddess' Embrace having now gathered to observe the contest, even some of the brothel patrons having come out of their rooms to watch while Belle looks on in disbelief, nodding stiffly when you turn to her for confirmation.
Meanwhile, in the middle of the messy uproar, a perky little voice rises.
Oooh, we have a friend with that name at the Vllge!
He he, that's a funny name.
He he, y'won't laugh sho much when y'taste thish... It'sh made from chelshesh- cheltesh- from {i}angel{/i} herbs and it packsh the biggest punch th-that ever punched...

Too blitzed to take umbrage, Elena just snickers drunkenly while you fetch one of the priceless white-and-gold flasks the Goddess' Embrace boasts, very carefully uncorking it and filling two shots, barely having the time to withdraw the bottle before the guild lady's hand snatches her drink, soon followed by the Blue Slime. This time, there is no toasting, both women draining their glass while their spectators look on in reverent silence.

Instantly, the human competitor plainly feels the inebriating and arousing effects of the celestially powerful alcohol, her expression going blank before she laboriously focuses back on the blueberry monster girl with a stifled huff of effort, looking like it's taking her every ounce of her willpower not to cum and faint on the spot.

As for the goo girl, she fidgets awkwardly in place after partaking of the heavenly concoction, her apparent discomfort lighting a spark of triumph in her opponent's eyes, everyone collectively holding their breath when the slime gingerly opens her mouth...

... Then she immediately goes back to her usual carefree demeanor while Elena deflates and the entire room goes wild, some loudly cheering, some bemoaning an unwise gamble, others calling out cheating, and some starting to advance upon the competitors to praise them on what seems like a hard-fought draw.

However, before they can reach them, the guildswoman suddenly springs into action with incredible speed, pouncing upon the Blue Slime's seat and effortlessly lifting it into the air, immediately rousing gasps of alarm and panic from the audience, some members of which bravely scramble into action to stop her before she does something she would regret, while you prepare to vault over the counter as Elena opens her mouth to speak.

Caught by surprise by her bellowing congratulation that must have been heard all the way to the Demon Queen's castle, everyone freezes... then joins the celebration with good cheer: clapping, whistling, and whooping surround the slime girl who sports an absolutely blank but happy smile as she bobs up and down under the movements of Elena who hoists and parades her around like a trophy, howling in acclaim.

... Then Elena suddenly stops, her eyes glaze over, and she falls over in a heap, the prodigious amount of alcohol she consumed finally catching up with her, leaving her sprawled on the ground, completely smashed. Silence returns to the inn as the dropped stool comes to a clattering stop and the fallen monster girl picks herself off the floor, rising from a blue splat back to her normal height.

The Goddess' Embrace's clientele collectively sigh, shake their heads, and chuckle at this new but not unexpected development, the prestigious guildmistress promptly falling into sloppy snoring slumber. Tentatively, the Blue Slime pokes her cheek, eliciting a woozy mumble from her, but no more, prompting one of the patrons to comment.
Well, I guess someone had better bring her back home.
I shall take care of it.
The clipped, no-nonsense, professional voice swiftly commands everyone's attention...

... and turns out to belong to Elly who strides in dignifiedly, a stark contrast to the messily lying Elena, exhales and nods of relief from the customers giving you the bleak feeling that this is not the first time something like this is happening...

... and right on cue, Elly strides in dignifiedly, a stark contrast to the messily lying Elena, bringing welcome relief to you and the inn's barflies at the idea that you won't be the one having to handle the cleanup.
I sent someone to get her. This isn't my first rodeo.
Grumbling, Elly nonetheless gets to work bringing Elena home, muttering a brief incantation that gently lifts her in the air before turning to Belle.

|f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Expression|/|2|/|Base|n||f|ChangeImageLayer|/|RightArm|/|2|/|ArmRDown|n||f|ChangeImageLayer|/|Glasses|/|2|/|Glasses|n|As before, Elly wastes no time getting to work in bringing Elena home, muttering a brief incantation that gently lifts her in the air before turning to Belle.
I'll make sure that she pays her tab... As well as any damages.

Chortling, Belle strides off to put the common room back in order while Elly rolls her eyes and walks back towards the exit with the levitating woman in tow... but is unexpectedly stopped by a poke from the sheepish Blue Slime, the mage looking down at her with puzzlement.
Taking in the question soberly, the wizardess looks from the monster girl to the floating drunkard, and answers coolly.
No, I cannot say she's okay.

There's a short spell of silence during which the jelly girl stares at Elena with concern while the businesslike bespectacled guildswoman watches her without volunteering further discussion, until the slime looks back to her hopefully.
... Could I come with you, then? Just to make sure she'll be alright? She's been very nice with me and bought me all kinds of new and interesting and tasty drinks, so...
Oh, it's okay, we can just start as... buddies? Pen pals? My name is...

Despite the usual curtness of Elly's tone, she doesn't look too displeased to see the slime girl, her shoulders actually seeming to untense slightly when the carefree jelly lady smiles disarmingly at her.
Yup! Can I come with again?

Elly briefly scans the room, as if checking for reactions from the inn's clientele, a few eavesdroppers in fact very quickly turning away and pretending to be deeply interested in their drinks under her inquisitive gaze, the scrambling response making her scoff, but ultimately shrug.
Cool!♪ We can talk about stuff, like that thing you mentioned in your last letter, the-
{i}Yes, let's go.{/i} We... can talk about that later.

Hurriedly, Elly leads her out of the inn while casting a sharp glare to a handful of regulars sporting poorly disguised knowing expressions, the clueless Blue Slime gladly following her cue while gabbing enthusiastically, breezily switching the conversation to her recent fishing exploits.

Her voice fades as the two of them make their way out of the inn with the insensate Elena still floating after them, the slime chattering happily while Elly answers tersely with visible awkwardness, leaving the Goddess' Embrace to return to business as usual with surprising speed... and you to complete your shift, the rest of which feels like a beacon of tranquility and normalcy compared to that hectic stunt you just experienced.

Eventually, your stint comes to an end, leaving you feeling even more exhausted than you were expecting you would be... But at least, true to her word, Belle gives you a nice bonus in addition to your bartending pay. A quite hefty one, actually, making you wonder how many times she's had to deal with a situation just like this one, and how relieved she must have been to have someone else take care of it.
Go see Elena at the Guild counter.
